title: Iran responds to Trump's threat
description: Time is ticking after Donald Trump issued an ultimatum to Iran open the Strait of Hormuz within 48 hours or America will attack their power plants.   Iran has responded, saying that if that happens, all American information technology and desalination infrastructure will be targeted. #iran #us

title: PM holds crisis talks over surging fuel prices | 7NEWS
description: Anthony Albanese is scheduled to meet with the International Energy Agency boss Fatir Birral in Canberra as petrol and diesel prices continue to surge. The IEA chief has recommended Australians work from home, reduce driving speeds and avoid air travel to ease pressure on fuel consumption, though the Prime Minister has dismissed these as global rather than Australia-specific suggestions. Australia has failed to meet the IEA's requirement of maintaining 90 days of oil reserves since 2012. title: Savannah Guthrie's mother still missing after seven weeks | 7NEWS
description: Nancy Guthrie, mother of TV host Savannah Guthrie, disappeared from her Arizona home on 1 February, allegedly abducted in the dead of night. Despite a $1 million reward for information, police remain no closer to finding her or her alleged abductor after seven weeks. Her children have issued a renewed public plea for information, asking neighbours to review security cameras and messages from that date, as they seek closure and believe she may not be alive. title: Trump's Iran ultimatum sparks fuel crisis talks | 7NEWS
description: Donald Trump has issued an ultimatum to Iran threatening to destroy the country's power plants, with a Tuesday deadline approaching.
